lean_declaration:
theorem det_swap_cols (A : Matrix (Fin n) (Fin n) K) (i j : Fin n) (hij : i ≠ j) :
    (A.submatrix id (Equiv.swap i j)).det = -A.det := by
  calc
    (A.submatrix id (Equiv.swap i j)).det = ((A.submatrix id (Equiv.swap i j))ᵀ).det := by rw [det_transpose]
    _ = (Aᵀ.submatrix (Equiv.swap i j) id).det := by rw [Matrix.transpose_submatrix]
    _ = -((Aᵀ).det) := by rw [det_swap_rows (Aᵀ) i j hij]
    _ = -A.det := by rw [det_transpose]
notes: Formalizes the column analogue of the row swap determinant theorem via transposition, as outlined in the source proof.
